rulings.Case Title: ROBERT BRYAN et al VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudiciation
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 29, 2016, line 1. DEFENDANT JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudiciation Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Triable issue of fact regarding formation of contract, waiver and damages. Defendant's Motion for Summary Adjudication of the cause of action for Promissory Estoppel is GRANTED, non-opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LEW ROTHGEB VS. GREG DE FOREST ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 29, 2016, line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT LEW ROTHGEB, GREG BRYAN DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Cross-Complaint sufficiently alleges causes of action for conversion, violation of CC 1712 and unjust enrichment. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LEW ROTHGEB VS. GREG DE FOREST ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 29, 2016, line 4. CROSS DEFENDANT LEW ROTHGEB, GREG BRYAN MOTION TO STRIKE CROSS COMPLAINT GRANTED with leave to amend to allege fact re: malice, oppression or fraud. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NEW HORIZON CONSULTING, INC. VS. AURORA MARTINEZ SANGIL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 29, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANT AURORA SANGIL, SANTIAGO SANGIL AMENDED DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action under CCP 1161a and is not uncertain. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN STEWART COMPANY VS. THOMSD DEBOLT ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-16-654368 WITH CASE CUD-16-654366
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 29, 2016, line 6. PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CUD-16-654368 WITH CASE CUD-16-654366 GRANTED. Actions are consolidated for all purposes. CUD-16-654366 shall be the lead case. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TODD IVERSON ET AL VS. SPENCER GRIMES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiffs' Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 29, 2016, line 10. PAINTIFF TODD IVERSON, TRACY IVERSON Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Plaintiffs' Request For Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. Spencer Grimes to provide responses by hand-delivery or via e-mail without objections within 5 days of notice of entry of order. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,005 for both motions. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ISH HARSHAWAT VS. DAVID M. BRENKUS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Five-Day Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday March 29, 2016, line 11. DEFENDANT DAVID BRENKUS Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Five-Day Summons And Complaint DENIED. See Roy v. Sup. Ct (2005) 127 Cal.App.4th 337 and Borsuk v. Appellate Division (2015) 242 Cal.App.4th 607. = (501/REQ)
